title: carex oederi subsp. viridula
intro: Carex oederi subsp. viridula, also known as a type of sedge, is a perennial plant belonging to the Carex genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Carex oederi subsp. viridula has been reported to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support lung health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis.
